'''Yarda''' was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solem]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and part of local rebel forces against the planetary [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Malvander Bren]]. He was killed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] while trying to protect his leader, [[Yolan Bren]].

{{Char-stub}}
